MINORIS-CARD001_STRIKE.title: Strike
MINORIS-CARD002_DEFEND.title: Defend
MINORIS-CARD003_INSTINCT_SCRATCH.title: Instinct Scratch
MINORIS-CARD004_INTUITIVE_DODGE.title: Intuitive Dodge
MINORIS-CARD005_WHIP.title: Whip
MINORIS-CARD006_CHASE.title: Chase
MINORIS-CARD006_CHASE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the last card you played was an [gold]Attack[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
MINORIS-CARD007_SPIN_STRIKE.title: Spin Strike
MINORIS-CARD007_SPIN_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Your next [gold]Skill[/gold] costs {EnergyReduce:diff()} less.
MINORIS-CARD008_IMPROVISED_STRIKE.title: Improvised Strike
MINORIS-CARD008_IMPROVISED_STRIKE.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add another card with "Strike" in its name to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD009_TESTING_BLOW.title: Testing Blow
MINORIS-CARD010_QUADRACUT.title: Quadracut
MINORIS-CARD010_QUADRACUT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD011_PRECISE_SCRATCH.title: Precise Scratch
MINORIS-CARD012_SLAM.title: Slam
MINORIS-CARD013_AMBUSH.title: Ambush
MINORIS-CARD013_AMBUSH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Play a "Scratch" Attack in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD014_FULL_SCRATCH.title: Full Scratch
MINORIS-CARD015_BOOMERANG.title: Boomerang
MINORIS-CARD015_BOOMERANG.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put this on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD016_SUPERSONIC.title: Supersonic
MINORIS-CARD016_SUPERSONIC.description:
Lose 1 HP.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
MINORIS-CARD017_ELEGANT_SCRATCH.title: Elegant Scratch
MINORIS-CARD017_ELEGANT_SCRATCH.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits:diff()} times.
This combat, all "Scratch" Attacks deal +{ScratchAmp:diff()} damage.
MINORIS-CARD018_TIP_OVER.title: Tip Over
MINORIS-CARD018_TIP_OVER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Auto-play any [gold]Attacks[/gold] drawn.
MINORIS-CARD019_SOBEK_STRIKE.title: Sobek Strike
MINORIS-CARD020_CALL_OF_JACKAL.title: Call of the Jackal
MINORIS-CARD020_CALL_OF_JACKAL.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits:diff()} times.
Each time you play this, it hits 1 additional time this combat.
MINORIS-CARD021_MASTER_CRAFT.title: Master Craft
MINORIS-CARD021_MASTER_CRAFT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits:diff()} times.
This card can be upgraded infinitely.
MINORIS-CARD022_JUSTICE.title: Justice
MINORIS-CARD022_JUSTICE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Exhaust all 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} cost cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], [gold]Hand[/gold], and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]. For each card exhausted, this gains +{BonusPerCard:diff()} damage and +{BonusPerCard:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD023_SOLAR_FLARE.title: Solar Flare
MINORIS-CARD023_SOLAR_FLARE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Exhaust 1 card from your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Reduce this card's cost this combat by that card's cost.
MINORIS-CARD024_HURRICANE_STRIKE.title: Hurricane Strike
MINORIS-CARD024_HURRICANE_STRIKE.descrip: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {HitsPerX:diff()}X times.
MINORIS-CARD025_SUN_LENS.title: Sun Lens
MINORIS-CARD025_SUN_LENS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
For each enemy killed, draw {Energy:diff()} card(s) and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
MINORIS-CARD026_DIVINE_LIGHT.title: Divine Light
MINORIS-CARD026_DIVINE_LIGHT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits:diff()} times.
For each "Scratch" Attack you have played this combat, deal 1 additional hit.
MINORIS-CARD027_OFFERING_OF_SOBEK.title: Offering of Sobek
MINORIS-CARD027_OFFERING_OF_SOBEK.descri:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Exhaust 1 card from your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Permanently increase this card's value by that card's cost.
MINORIS-CARD028_HAMMER_OF_GODS.title: Hammer of the Gods
MINORIS-CARD028_HAMMER_OF_GODS.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
This card can be upgraded infinitely.
Upgrades made in combat are permanent.
MINORIS-CARD029_WRATH_OF_VENGEANCE.title: Wrath of Vengeance
MINORIS-CARD029_WRATH_OF_VENGEANCE.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Hits:diff()} times.
Repeat once for each time you were hurt this combat.
MINORIS-CARD030_PANICKED_DODGE.title: Panicked Dodge
MINORIS-CARD030_PANICKED_DODGE.descripti:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Transform a random card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD031_MISDIRECT.title: Misdirect
MINORIS-CARD032_TRAINING.title: Training
MINORIS-CARD033_CONSTRUCT.title: Construct
MINORIS-CARD033_CONSTRUCT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Each time you play this in combat, gain +{BonusPerPlay:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] the next time you play it this combat.
MINORIS-CARD034_ROLL.title: Roll
MINORIS-CARD035_BIND.title: Bind
MINORIS-CARD036_CAT_STEP.title: Cat Step
MINORIS-CARD037_EVADE.title: Evade
MINORIS-CARD038_PAPER_PLANE.title: Boomerang Paper Plane
MINORIS-CARD038_PAPER_PLANE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever you play 3 [gold]Attacks[/gold], return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD039_CAT_TALISMAN.title: Cat Talisman
MINORIS-CARD040_HALFTIME.title: Halftime
MINORIS-CARD040_HALFTIME.description: If the last card you played was an [gold]Attack[/gold], gain {EnergyGain:energyIcons()}.
MINORIS-CARD041_DEADLY_COFFEE.title: Deadly Coffee
MINORIS-CARD041_DEADLY_COFFEE.descriptio:
Gain {EnergyGain:energyIcons()}.
At the end of your turn, take {Damage:diff()} damage.
MINORIS-CARD042_ALLERGEN.title: Allergen
MINORIS-CARD042_ALLERGEN.description: This turn, whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold], draw 1 card and lose 2 HP.
MINORIS-CARD043_CITY_OF_PILLARS.title: City of Pillars
MINORIS-CARD044_MINT_CANDY.title: Mint Candy
MINORIS-CARD044_MINT_CANDY.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Your next [gold]Attack[/gold] costs {EnergyReduce:diff()} less.
MINORIS-CARD045_COMMANDING.title: Commanding
MINORIS-CARD046_CATAPULT_START.title: Catapult Start
MINORIS-CARD046_CATAPULT_START.descripti:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
This card can be upgraded infinitely.
MINORIS-CARD047_SMALL_FREEZE_DRIED.title: Small Freeze-Dried
MINORIS-CARD048_CARDBOARD_HOUSE.title: Cardboard House
MINORIS-CARD048_CARDBOARD_HOUSE.descript:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Each time you've played this card this combat, the next time you play it, gain {Decrease:diff()} less [gold]Block[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD049_STRESS_RESPONSE.title: Stress Response
MINORIS-CARD049_STRESS_RESPONSE.descript: This turn, whenever you play a card, lose 1 HP and gain {Amount:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD050_BANDAGE_HEAL.title: Bandage Heal
MINORIS-CARD051_BUTTER_TRAP.title: Butter Trap
MINORIS-CARD051_BUTTER_TRAP.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
This turn, whenever you are attacked, apply 2 [gold]Weak[/gold] and 2 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to the attacker.
MINORIS-CARD052_MOON_STEP.title: Moon Step
MINORIS-CARD052_MOON_STEP.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}, draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Each time you play this card this combat, its cost increases by 1.
MINORIS-CARD053_ALCHEMICAL_CRUCIBLE.desc: Choose {ExhaustCount:diff()} cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] to Exhaust, then randomly gain {GainCount:diff()} card(s).
MINORIS-CARD054_DEATH_ROLL.title: Death Roll
MINORIS-CARD054_DEATH_ROLL.description: Apply {GripPower:diff()} [gold]Grip[/gold].{IfUpgraded:show:\nTargets ALL enemies.| Targets a single enemy.}
MINORIS-CARD055_LIGHT_AS_FEATHER.title: Light as a Feather
MINORIS-CARD056_TOTH_SLATE_I.title: Toth Slate-I
MINORIS-CARD056_TOTH_SLATE_I.description:
Interpret the slate and unlock its message.
After combat, transform this card into {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold] |}"Toth Slate-II".
MINORIS-CARD056_1_TOTH_SLATE_II.title: Toth Slate-II
MINORIS-CARD056_1_TOTH_SLATE_II.descript:
Emerald script bears truth.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. After combat, transform this card into {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold] |}"Toth Slate-III".
MINORIS-CARD056_2_TOTH_SLATE_III.title: Toth Slate-III
MINORIS-CARD056_2_TOTH_SLATE_III.descrip:
Heaven and earth in accord, all laws as one.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. After combat, transform this card into {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold] |}"Toth Slate-IV".
MINORIS-CARD056_3_TOTH_SLATE_IV.title: Toth Slate-IV
MINORIS-CARD056_3_TOTH_SLATE_IV.descript:
The One gives birth to all.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. After combat, transform this card into {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold] |}"Toth Slate-V".
MINORIS-CARD056_4_TOTH_SLATE_V.title: Toth Slate-V
MINORIS-CARD056_4_TOTH_SLATE_V.descripti:
Sun and moon guide, wind and earth nurture.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Heal {Heal:diff()} HP. After combat, transform this card into {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold] |}"Toth Slate-VI".
MINORIS-CARD056_5_TOTH_SLATE_VI.title: Toth Slate-VI
MINORIS-CARD056_5_TOTH_SLATE_VI.descript:
Separate earth and essence; refinement is achieved.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Heal {Heal:diff()} HP. You may Exhaust 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. After combat, transform this card into {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold] |}"Toth Slate-VII".
MINORIS-CARD056_6_TOTH_SLATE_VII.title: Toth Slate-VII
MINORIS-CARD056_6_TOTH_SLATE_VII.descrip:
Earth holds all power, strength spans heaven and earth.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Heal {Heal:diff()} HP. You may Exhaust 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gain {Strength:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold]. After combat, transform this card into {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold] |}"Toth Slate-VIII".
MINORIS-CARD056_7_TOTH_SLATE_VIII.title: Toth Slate-VIII
MINORIS-CARD056_7_TOTH_SLATE_VIII.descri:
Ascend and descend, connecting above and below.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Heal {Heal:diff()} HP. You may Exhaust 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gain {Strength:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold]. Draw {Draw:diff()} card(s) and it is Retained this combat. After combat, transform this card into {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold] |}"Toth Slate-IX".
MINORIS-CARD056_8_TOTH_SLATE_IX.title: Toth Slate-IX
MINORIS-CARD056_8_TOTH_SLATE_IX.descript:
With this you rule the world and shatter the abyss.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Heal {Heal:diff()} HP. You may Exhaust 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gain {Strength:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold]. Draw {Draw:diff()} card(s) and it is Retained this combat. Gain {Dexterity:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. After combat, transform this card into {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold] |}"Toth Slate-X".
MINORIS-CARD056_9_TOTH_SLATE_X.title: Toth Slate-X
MINORIS-CARD056_9_TOTH_SLATE_X.descripti:
This power is supreme, shattering all barriers.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Heal {Heal:diff()} HP. You may Exhaust 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gain {Strength:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold]. Draw {Draw:diff()} card(s) and it is Retained this combat. Gain {Dexterity:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. Gain {Vigor:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold]. After combat, transform this card into {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold] |}"Toth Slate-XI".
MINORIS-CARD056_10_TOTH_SLATE_XI.title: Toth Slate-XI
MINORIS-CARD056_10_TOTH_SLATE_XI.descrip:
Worldly creation, wondrous through this.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Heal {Heal:diff()} HP. You may Exhaust 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gain {Strength:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold]. Draw {Draw:diff()} card(s) and it is Retained this combat. Gain {Dexterity:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. Gain {Vigor:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold]. Gain {Artifact:diff()} [gold]Artifact[/gold]. After combat, transform this card into {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold] |}"Toth Slate-XII".
MINORIS-CARD056_11_TOTH_SLATE_XII.title: Toth Slate-XII
MINORIS-CARD056_11_TOTH_SLATE_XII.descri:
Wisdom of three realms, triple exalted name.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Heal {Heal:diff()} HP. You may Exhaust 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gain {Strength:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold]. Draw {Draw:diff()} card(s) and it is Retained this combat. Gain {Dexterity:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. Gain {Vigor:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold]. Gain {Artifact:diff()} [gold]Artifact[/gold]. Replay {Replay:diff()}. After combat, transform this card into {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold] |}"Toth Slate-XIII".
MINORIS-CARD056_12_TOTH_SLATE_XIII.title: Toth Slate-XIII
MINORIS-CARD056_12_TOTH_SLATE_XIII.descr:
Truth.
At the end of your turn, trigger the following effect [blue]{Amount}[/blue] time(s): Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]; deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy; At the start of your turn,  gain {Energy:energyIcons()}; heal {Heal:diff()} HP; you may Exhaust 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]; gain {Strength:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold]; draw {Draw:diff()} card(s) and it is Retained this combat; gain {Dexterity:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold]; gain {Vigor:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold]; gain {Artifact:diff()} [gold]Artifact[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD057_EYE_CHARM.title: Eye Charm
MINORIS-CARD057_EYE_CHARM.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Until your [gold]Block[/gold] is broken, your [gold]Block[/gold] does not disappear.
MINORIS-CARD058_GATHER_STRENGTH.title: Buildup
MINORIS-CARD058_GATHER_STRENGTH.descript:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Next turn, draw {DrawExtraNextTurnPower:diff()} additional cards.
[gold]Retain[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold].
End your turn.
MINORIS-CARD059_FORTUNE.title: Fortune
MINORIS-CARD059_FORTUNE.description: Choose a{IfUpgraded:show: [gold]Upgraded[/gold]|} [gold]Class[/gold] card and play it.
MINORIS-CARD060_KITTEN_KNIFE.title: Kitten Knife
MINORIS-CARD060_KITTEN_KNIFE.description: Whenever your [gold]Attacks[/gold] deal damage, deal {KittenKnifePower:diff()} additional damage.
MINORIS-CARD061_BRONZE_GAUNTLET.title: Bronze Gauntlet
MINORIS-CARD062_TOY_CLAW.title: Toy Claw
MINORIS-CARD062_TOY_CLAW.description: At the start of your turn, add {ToyClawPower:diff()} "Scratch{IfUpgraded:show:+|}" card(s) to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD062_1_SCRATCH.title: Scratch
MINORIS-CARD063_CAT_SCRATCH_BOARD.title: Scratch Board
MINORIS-CARD063_CAT_SCRATCH_BOARD.descri: Whenever you play a [gold]Skill[/gold], gain {Dexterity:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.
MINORIS-CARD064_LITTLE_BELL.title: Little Bell
MINORIS-CARD064_LITTLE_BELL.description: During your turn, whenever you lose HP, gain {Strength:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD065_GENERATOR.title: Generator
MINORIS-CARD065_GENERATOR.description: During your turn, whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()} next turn.
MINORIS-CARD066_DIMENSIONAL_SCRATCH.desc: Your "Scratch" Attacks now target all enemies.
MINORIS-CARD067_METRONOME.title: Metronome
MINORIS-CARD067_METRONOME.description: Whenever you play a [gold]Strike[/gold], draw 1 card.
MINORIS-CARD068_SELF_TAUGHT.title: Self-Taught
MINORIS-CARD068_SELF_TAUGHT.description:
Gain {Strength:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Gain {Dexterity:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
At the start of your turn, draw {Draw:diff()} additional card(s).
MINORIS-CARD069_SETS_CHOICE.title: Set's Choice
MINORIS-CARD069_SETS_CHOICE.description: Choose 1 of: Sandstorm, Thunder Flash, Betrayal. Add it to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD069_1_SANDSTORM.title: Sandstorm
MINORIS-CARD069_1_SANDSTORM.description: This turn, you only take 50% damage.
MINORIS-CARD069_2_THUNDER_FLASH.title: Thunder Flash
MINORIS-CARD069_2_THUNDER_FLASH.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits:diff()} times to random enemies.
MINORIS-CARD069_3_BETRAYAL.title: Betrayal
MINORIS-CARD069_3_BETRAYAL.description: At the start of your turn, choose a{IfUpgraded:show: [gold]Upgraded[/gold]|} card from other classes and add it to your hand. It costs 0 until played.
MINORIS-CARD070_ISIS_REBIRTH.title: Isis Rebirth
MINORIS-CARD071_SOLAR_FORM.title: Solar Form
MINORIS-CARD071_SOLAR_FORM.description: At the start of your turn, add a random{IfUpgraded:show: [gold]Upgraded[/gold]|} [gold]Attack[/gold], [gold]Skill[/gold], and [gold]Power[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. They cost 0 this combat, but are [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD072_BAST_BLESSING.title: Bast's Blessing
MINORIS-CARD073_APOPHIS_ARRIVES.title: Apophis Arrives
MINORIS-CARD073_APOPHIS_ARRIVES.descript: At the end of your turn, deal {ApophisArrivesPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Every 3 turns, at the start of your turn, deal {ApophisArrivesPower:diff()} damage to yourself.
MINORIS-CARD074_WILD_SCRATCH.title: Wild Scratch
MINORIS-CARD074_WILD_SCRATCH.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits:diff()} times to ALL enemies.
MINORIS-CARD075_WILD_FORM.title: Wild Form
MINORIS-CARD075_WILD_FORM.description: Set the cost of your [gold]Attacks[/gold] to 0. Your [gold]Attacks[/gold] are [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD076_COMMAND_THE_HUNT.title: Command the Hunt
MINORIS-CARD076_COMMAND_THE_HUNT.descrip: Whenever another player plays an [gold]Attack[/gold], play it {CommandTheHuntPower:diff()} additional times.
MINORIS-CARD077_HELLO_PARTNER.title: Hello, Partner!
MINORIS-CARD077_HELLO_PARTNER.descriptio: All allies gain {Energy:energyIcons()}, draw {Cards:diff()} cards, and heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
